zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Ogle於1306年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德奧格爾時，他的父親Robert de Ogle11303歲，母親Margaret Gobion11歲。他於1329年3月28日之後與Joan de Hepple結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1362年6月13日在英國諾圖波藍德享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Ogle于1306年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德奧格爾时，他的父亲Robert de Ogle11303岁，母亲Margaret Gobion11岁。他于1329年3月28日之后与Joan de Hepple结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1362年6月13日在英国諾圖波藍德享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ogle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northumberland and Durham): from Ogle in Whalton, Northumberland. The placename might derive from the Old English personal name Ocga + Old English hyll ‘hill’. This surname has been established in Ireland since the mid 17th century.

variants.name: Ogles
meanings: English (southeastern): variant of Ogle , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Ogle was born in 1306, in Ogle, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert de Ogle, was 11303 and his mother, Margaret Gobion, was 11. He married Joan de Hepple after 28 March 1329. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 13 June 1362, in Northumberland, England, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Ogle est né en 1306, à Ogle, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Ogle, avait 11303 ans et sa mère, Margaret Gobion, avait 11 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Hepple après 28 mars 1329. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 13 juin 1362, à Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Ogle 1306 in Ogle, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Ogle 11303 und seine Mutter Margaret Gobion 11. Er hat nach 28. März 1329 Joan de Hepple geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 13. Juni 1362 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Ogle è nato il nel 1306 nel Ogle, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert de Ogle, aveva 11303 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Gobion, aveva 11 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Hepple dopo il 28 marzo 1329. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 13 giugno 1362, nel Northumberland, England, all'età di 56 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Ogle(이)가 1306년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 오글에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Ogle(은)는 11303세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Gobion(은)는 11세였다. 그는 1329년 3월 28일 이후 Joan de Hepple(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1362년 6월 13일 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Ogle nasceu em 1306, em Ogle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Ogle, tinha 11303 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Gobion, tinha 11 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Hepple após 28 de março de 1329. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 13 de junho de 1362, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Ogle родился в 1306 г. в местности огл, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert de Ogle было 11303 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Gobion, 11. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Hepple после 28 марта 1329 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 13 июня 1362 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Ogle nació en 1306, en Ogle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert de Ogle, tenía 11303 años y su mamá, Margaret Gobion, tenía 11 años. Se casó con Joan de Hepple después de 28 de marzo de 1329. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 13 de junio de 1362, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años.
